data.title: International law enforcement seize domains behind the sanctioned Russian crypto exchange Garantex
data.description:
Garantex purportedly enables money laundering from criminal organizations and has processed at least $96 billion in digital asset transactions since 2019.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/345266/international-law-enforcement-seize-domains-behind-the-sanctioned-russian-crypto-exchange-garantex?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: David Sacks: Trump's crypto project has nothing to do with industry regulation, and there is no evidence that Trump has personal investment in cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News David Sacks, the head of cryptocurrency at the White House, said in an interview that Trump's personal crypto projects (such as controversial meme coins) have "nothing to do with government policy." When asked whether Trump's cryptocurrency projects affect industry regulation, Sacks said: "I don't think it has any impact. It has nothing to do with our work here." When asked about Trump's "personal investment" in cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin, he said: "These are facts without evidence." (Decrypt)

data.title: David Sacks: Trump's personal crypto activities have no impact on regulation and are irrelevant to policy making
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News David Sacks, the White House AI and cryptocurrency director, said in an interview when asked whether Trump’s own encryption project affected industry regulation: “I don’t think it has any impact. It has nothing to do with what we are doing here.”

data.title: Offchain Labs CEO: US crypto reserves should only be Bitcoin, other cryptocurrencies have the risk of artificial promotion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Offchain Labs CEO Steven Goldfeder said that the U.S. cryptocurrency reserves should focus only on Bitcoin, at least for now, despite calls from some, including Trump, to include other cryptocurrencies. Goldfeder believes that Bitcoin has stood out in a generally accepted way, and focusing on Bitcoin is the cleanest and easiest move. There are dangers in allowing other assets to be included in reserves because regulators do not know the complexity of all cryptocurrencies, nor do they know who is pushing each cryptocurrency to be included in the market. (The Block)

data.title: White House Crypto Summit: No crypto tax breaks for investors?
data.description:
The White House Crypto Summit allegedly will not propose capital gains tax exemptions for cryptocurrency. However, the industry is waiting for the final verdict.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/policy/white-house-crypto-no-crypto-tax-breaks-for-investors

data.title: Largest Bitcoin Wallets Holding at Least 100 BTC Fell in One Month, Says Analytics Firm – Here’s What It Means
data.description:
New data from market intelligence firm Santiment shows that one key segment of all Bitcoin (BTC) holders is suddenly declining. In a new update, the crypto analytics platform says that the number of crypto whales holding at least 100 Bitcoin decreased in the past month – even as the number of network wallets has grown […]
The post Largest Bitcoin Wallets Holding at Least 100 BTC Fell in One...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/07/largest-bitcoin-wallets-holding-at-least-100-btc-fell-in-one-month-says-analytics-firm-heres-what-it-means/
